div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Ecuador (Scotten)
div.p: The Acting Secretary of State transmits herewith for the information of the Officer in Charge a copy of the amendatory agreement signed July 12, 1946Not printed. between the Republic of Ecuador and the Export-Import Bank to increase the credit of $1,200,000 authorized on July 15, 1943 to $1,980,000 to assist in financing the cost of constructing the Guamote-Tambo Highway and also to extend the expiry date of the former agreement from December 31, 1946 to June 30, 1948.
